name: Basic White Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the flour and stir continuously until the mixture begins to bubble.
3. Gradually stir in the warm milk, stirring continuously until smooth and the desired thickness is achieved.
4. Add your preferred seasonings (e.g., salt and pepper) as desired.
Note: For a thinner white sauce, reduce the flour and butter to 1 tablespoon each. For a thicker white sauce, increase the flour and other ingredients to 3 tablespoons each.
Note: To make Alfredo sauce, add garlic powder, onion powder, and Parmesan cheese to taste.
